default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webflow and GrowthX teams to discuss content creation progress, workflows, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages progressing well; 10 published, aiming for most done by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [SEO content workflow evolving; goal is to reduce need for DevRel review](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Listicles strategy needs refinement; team to review and comment on proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Integration guides still in early stages; first draft for membership experience coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Analytics access and tracking to be confirmed with Webflow team](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

## Topics

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [10 integration pages published, more to be done by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Feedback from Zach and Vic mostly minor, addressing style rather than accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Moving towards publishing without DevRel review once comments addressed](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Aiming for continuous improvement in content quality with each iteration](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### SEO Content Workflow

  - ["What is composable commerce?" article received significant feedback from Vic](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Focus on less corporate tone, more practical advice, and authoritative examples](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Goal: encode feedback into scalable process for future content](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Balancing quality expectations with scalability for SEO needs](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)
  - [Aiming to reduce need for DevRel review after initial calibration](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### Listicles Strategy

  - [Initial attempt with Next.js article highlighted need for better Webflow positioning](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Team to map out desired listicle topics and share for Webflow team review](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Webflow team to provide guidance on product mentions and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Once aligned on approach, process expected to become more streamlined](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### Integration Guides

  - [First draft for membership experience on Webflow coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Will include custom solutions and integrations like Outseta and MemberStack](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Currently most manual process; aiming to find optimal output before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [GrowthX team has CMS access but unsure about ability to add analytics trackers](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Colin to confirm if GrowthX can add their measurement pixel or access Webflow's analytics](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [API key access also to be confirmed, as current access may be limited](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Luke to review and comment on proposed listicle topics in shared Google Sheet](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise SEO content draft incorporating Vic's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Jason to complete first draft of integration guide for membership experience](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Colin to confirm analytics tracking options and API key access with Webflow team](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Continue refining integration page process towards reduced DevRel review need](https://fathom.video/share/bEwGsHXL3AXCue4N4kyEhsCKa5bo9Y84?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

action_items.description: Continue publishing integration pages to staging/site; aim to have most integrations and edits published by end of week
Revise SEO content draft incorporating Vic's feedback on tone, examples, and practical advice
Review & comment on GrowthX's Google Sheet of proposed listicles; focus on Webflow positioning & mentions
Complete first draft of integration guide for membership experience on Webflow (incl. Custom, Outseta, member stack)
Confirm if OK for GrowthX to add their analytics tracker to product features CMS; if not, ask site analytics about provisioning data access
Ask Corey about API key access for GrowthX team in product features CMS
